root_cause: _match_regexp() used re.match() (prefix-only anchoring) instead of re.fullmatch() (full-string anchoring), allowing suffix-appended classnames to bypass the deserialization allowlist
fix_description: Switched _match_regexp() from re.match() to re.fullmatch() so the pattern must match the entire classname string; updated config description to document fullmatch semantics
how_to_verify: uv run --project task-sdk pytest task-sdk/tests/task_sdk/serde/test_ghsa_6ffj_2wg2_w45j.py -xvs  OR  uv run dev/repro_ghsa_6ffj_2wg2_w45j.py
evidence: With allowed_deserialization_classes_regexp='airflow\.models\.Variable', _match_regexp() now uses re.fullmatch() which correctly rejects 'airflow.models.Variable_Malicious' (suffix bypass no longer possible)
